BackupFirmwareVersion.longDescription: Firmware version that is installed in the other (backup) flash memory

BootedFromBackupFlash.description: True if we booted from the backup flash memory, otherwise false.
BootedFromBackupFlash.longDescription: True if we booted from the backup flash memory, otherwise false

FlashSelector.description: Which SPI flash is used when updating the BMC
FlashSelector.longDescription: Which SPI flash is used when updating the BMC with a firmware. Only 'Primary' and 'Backup' are allowed values

IsPOE.description: Whether or not this BMC is PoE capable
IsPOE.longDescription: Whether or not this BMC is PoE capable

IsPOEActive.description: Whether or not this BMC is powered by PoE
IsPOEActive.longDescription: Whether or not this BMC is powered by PoE

PcbRevision.description: The hardware version of this equipment (from hardware signals)
PcbRevision.longDescription: The hardware version of this equipment (from hardware signals)

PrimaryFirmwareVersion.description: Firmware version that is installed in main/primary flash
PrimaryFirmwareVersion.longDescription: Firmware version that is installed in main/primary flash memory. Sometimes also called golden image

Version.description: The hardware version of this equipment (from EEPROM)
Version.longDescription: The hardware version of this equipment (from EEPROM)
